name: Broken War
description: A fragment of Stalker's War sword, a symbol of his defeat.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A fragment of Stalker's War sword, a symbol of his defeat.

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Nitain Extract
components.description:
Each vial is produced by the painstaking expression of billions of rare, ocean-vent dwelling microorganisms.

Location: Nightwave Cred Offerings

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Broken War Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing Riven for Broken War.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed erroneous hyphen from Broken-War, it will now forever be just Broken War.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Previous we shipped a change to include a Hilt and Blade component to the Broke War Blueprint in an effort to allow players to have both War and Broken War in their inventory.  Unfortunately, we failed to include the Hilt and Blade onto enemy drop tables.  This hotfix adds these components to Warframe’s drop table, listed below, correcting the unintentional error.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Sentient Stalker now drops War and Broken War blueprints.
